headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Paycom Software, Raises Price Target to $154
summary: Barclays  analyst Raimo Lenschow   maintains Paycom Software (NYSE:PAYC) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $148 to $154.
